checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive token to prevent spoofing attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce all documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Audit and implement safeguards in the Guardian Multisig contract to prevent signature bypass or elevation of privilege vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.description: The Guardian Multisig should be subject to thorough security audits and formal verification to ensure the 5-of-9 signature scheme cannot be bypassed, preventing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig (C16) has a critical vulnerability in its signature verification or execution logic that allows bypassing the M-of-N requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits and formal verification of the Guardian Multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, and monitoring logs for multisig execution.

checklist_items.title: Establish operational processes for Guardians, including key management and off-chain procedures, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.description: Operational procedures should include secure key backups, clear cancellation criteria, and monitoring, reducing risk of DoS due to Guardian unavailability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) contains a software vulnerability or is susceptible to network conditions that can cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and implement mechanisms for users to verify the authenticity of Reward Vaults before staking or depositing assets.
checklist_items.description: Users should verify that Reward Vaults are whitelisted and authentic before interaction. The interface must clearly show verification status.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may interact with unverified or malicious Reward Vaults created by malicious actors.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Official Reward Vault registries, clear display of contract addresses in BeraHub (C4), user education on verifying contract addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots of UI; registry listings; security audits of Reward Vault listing process.

checklist_items.title: Apply dominance detection and stake centralization monitoring to prevent stake accumulation from favoring centralization and censorship.
checklist_items.description: Monitoring stake distribution and enforcing stake caps or community sanctions helps maintain decentralization and resistance to censorship.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Entities with funds may stake multiple validator identities to centralize influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Monitor stake distribution with alerts, enforce stake caps per validator, and promote decentralization policies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Stake distribution reports, alert logs.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) has a critical vulnerability in its signature verification or execution logic that allows bypassing the M-of-N requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits and formal verification of the Guardian Multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, and monitoring logs for multisig execution.

checklist_items.title: Establish and enforce operational processes for Guardians, including key management and off-chain procedures, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.description: Operational procedures should include secure key backups, clear cancellation criteria, and monitoring, reducing risk of DoS due to Guardian unavailability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) contains a software vulnerability or is susceptible to network conditions that can cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious staking or unstaking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and deploy smart contracts, including FeeCollector, with strict source verification and whitelisted interaction lists to prevent spoofed or malicious fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: Unauthenticated or spoofed fee submissions (Asset 16) to the FeeCollector (C14) can cause accounting errors or system disruption.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of incoming fee data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement source whitelisting and strict input validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review; transaction logs showing source verification checks.

checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive token to prevent spoofing attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce all documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Audit and implement safeguards in the Guardian Multisig contract to prevent signature bypass or elevation of privilege vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.description: The Guardian Multisig contract should be subject to thorough security audits and formal verification to ensure the 5-of-9 signature scheme cannot be bypassed, preventing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) has a critical vulnerability in its signature verification or execution logic that allows bypassing the M-of-N requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits and formal verification of the Guardian Multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, and monitoring logs for multisig execution.

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.

checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) contains vulnerabilities or network issues that can cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, on-chain and network monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain and network logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement hardened wallet connection verification to prevent connection to spoofed or malicious dApp frontends.
checklist_items.description: The connection process should verify domain authenticity, warn users of potential phishing, and ensure only trusted sites can connect wallets.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users can be tricked into connecting to malicious dApps due to lack of verification.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Display domain verification, use browser extensions, and educate users.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training materials, UI security reviews.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and implement mechanisms for users to verify the authenticity of Reward Vaults before staking or depositing assets.
checklist_items.description: Users should verify that Reward Vaults are whitelisted and their addresses are authentic before interaction to prevent interaction with malicious or spoofed vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Malicious Reward Vaults could be deployed or listed without proper vetting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain an official, verified whitelist of Reward Vaults, and display this in the user interface.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Whitelist registry logs; confirmed Reward Vault address verification in UI.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-factor approval or multi-party signatures for governance proposal creation, especially for sensitive actions like whitelisting Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.description: Multi-party approval reduces risk of malicious proposals or impersonation. Implement thresholds or multi-signature approval for proposal submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak authentication could allow malicious proposal submission.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Introduce multi-party approval workflows and hardware-backed signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Proposal approval logs, multisig approval records.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification of proposal payloads to prevent tampering during off-chain creation.
checklist_items.description: Potential for proposal data tampering exists if off-chain systems are compromised. Use cryptographic signatures and hash verification to ensure integrity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal payloads could be altered before on-chain submission.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographic hashes and digital signatures in proposal submission workflows.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature verification logs, payload hash records.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and maintain secure, verified smart contracts for NFT bridges with formal verification and rigorous security audits.
checklist_items.description: NFT bridges (C12) handle asset transfers between chains and are high-value targets. Formal verification and security audits ensure their security.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: NFT bridge contracts or related systems are not securely implemented, risking malicious control.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use formal verification, comprehensive code audits, and follow best practices before deployment.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification artifacts.

checklist_items.title: Verify on-chain staking amount limits such as 250k $BERA minimum and 10M $BERA maximum to enforce constraints and prevent exploits.
checklist_items.description: Validator stake submissions must adhere to configured bounds. On-chain validation enforces limits and maintains network security.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Stake amounts can be manipulated or bypassed in the current system.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain validation checks for stake bounds during staking transactions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review, transaction logs confirming limits enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Include on-chain and off-chain processes for continuous monitoring of Validator stake distribution to prevent centralization.
checklist_items.description: Regular monitoring ensures stake is not concentrated among a few entities, maintaining network decentralization.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Stake decentralization monitoring is insufficient or inactive.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy monitoring tools and alert systems for stake distribution anomalies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Stake distribution reports, monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish operational procedures for Guardian signers, including key backup, secure storage, and procedural security to prevent key compromise.
checklist_items.description: Key compromise of Guardian signers can nullify governance safeguards. Secure management practices mitigate this.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardian signer keys are vulnerable due to weak operational controls.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware security modules, key rotation, multi-factor access, and operational protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures, key management logs.

checklist_items.title: Perform formal verification and security audits of the Guardian multisig (C16) contract to verify correct enforcement of 5-of-9 signature threshold.
checklist_items.description: To prevent privilege escalation, this contract must be airtight in its signature verification logic. Formal methods and audits verify compliance.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig contract (C16) may contain flaws enabling threshold bypass.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Formal verification, audits, and continuous monitoring of multisig behavior.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification certificates.

checklist_items.title: Implement continuous monitoring for multisig transaction activity in Guardian multisig to detect anomalies and potential compromise.
checklist_items.description: Monitoring multisig activities enables early detection of misuse or key compromise, allowing swift response.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Multisig transaction patterns may indicate compromise or misuse.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy monitoring tools, set alerts on abnormal transaction patterns, and establish incident response protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring logs, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Secure off-chain proposal systems with multi-factor authentication, hardware security modules, and cryptographic protections.
checklist_items.description: Off-chain proposal creation and submission systems must be secured to prevent tampering, impersonation, or unauthorized access.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The off-chain systems are vulnerable to compromise or tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules, multi-factor authentication, and secure channels.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security policies, system logs, hardware audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Verify the contract addresses are whitelisted and verified before interaction, and teach users to verify reward vault addresses.
checklist_items.description: User interactions should only occur with trusted Reward Vaults; verification prevents malicious or spoofed vault interactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Unverified or malicious Reward Vaults could be presented to users.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain an official whitelist, display verified addresses, and educate users.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Whitelist logs, UI verification indicators.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain validation of inflow incentive tokens, including balance checks and funding verification, before incentive rate adjustments.
checklist_items.description: Part of ensuring the incentive system’s reliability is validating token funding levels before rate changes, preventing underfunded incentives.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Incentive tokens may be underfunded or maliciously manipulated.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: On-chain balance checks, funding verification logic, and funding thresholds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain balance logs, funding proof in contract code.

checklist_items.title: Verify source authenticity of fee data in FeeCollector contracts against whitelisted sources.
checklist_items.description: To prevent spoofed fee submissions, FeeCollector should verify source addresses or signatures.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector currently accepts fees without source verification.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement whitelist or cryptographic signature checks for incoming fees.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Contract code review, transaction source logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and monitoring to prevent spam and DoS in governance proposals.
checklist_items.description: Control proposal submission rates via thresholds, deposits, or off-chain monitoring to mitigate spam and abuse.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: No proposal submission limits are currently enforced.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rate limit enforcement, deposit requirements, and on-chain monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Submission logs, deposit records.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-party approval or multi-signature confirmation for critical governance proposals to increase security.
checklist_items.description: Multi-signature approval prevents malicious or unauthorized proposal creation, especially for sensitive actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Single private key use for proposal submission can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-party approval workflows, multi-signature approval protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Approval logs from multisig, proposal signatures.

checklist_items.title: Require cryptographic signature validation and multi-party approval for governance proposal creation.
checklist_items.description: To prevent impersonation or tampering, proposals should be signed by multiple authorized parties.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal submission signatures may be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographic signature validation and multiple approval protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature verification logs, multi-party approval records.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: Key management practices are weak or compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig approval, hardware security modules, and regular key audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit reports; multisig transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Deploy secure, tamper-evident, and verified smart contracts for critical components such as HoneyFactory, with formal verification and comprehensive security audits.
checklist_items.description: Vulnerabilities in smart contracts (e.g., HoneyFactory) can be exploited by malicious users (Actor 1) to mint unbacked tokens or drain funds.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: HoneyFactory contract contains vulnerabilities or has been unvetted.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Perform formal verification, code audits, and security reviews before deploying or upgrading HoneyFactory.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports; formal verification proofs; code review records.

checklist_items.title: Ensure collateral valuation and liquidation mechanisms are robust and resilient against market manipulation and liquidity risks in HoneyFactory (C7).
checklist_items.description: Redemption failures or insolvency scenarios in HoneyFactory (C7) can prevent users from retrieving their collateralized assets, impacting trust and system stability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Collateral management is susceptible to market volatility or contract bugs.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement conservative collateral requirements, real-time oracle price feeds, and liquidation liquidity buffers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Collateral management monitoring logs; oracle data accuracy reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design FeeCollector (Component 14) to handle high transaction volumes securely and efficiently to prevent DoS through transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, transaction rate limiting, and monitoring to prevent attacker-induced DoS via excessive or malicious fee transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BEX (Component 3) might be malicious or bugged, causing high traffic or gas issues.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Optimize contract code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Performance audits, on-chain transaction volume reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement authorization checks in Reward Vault contracts to ensure only designated Token Managers can add or modify incentives.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) may not correctly verify the msg.sender as the authorized Token Manager, risking unauthorized incentives modification.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks in Reward Vault, matching `msg.sender` to stored authorized addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs or smart contract code review showing proper authorization checks.

checklist_items.title: Enforce business logic constraints in Reward Vault's incentive management functions to prevent violations like rate decreases during active periods or unauthorized token reclaiming.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) should implement and enforce strict rules to prevent manipulation of incentive parameters, including disallowing rate decreases while active and prohibiting token reclaims unless explicitly permitted.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) has a flaw allowing bypass of incentive management rules.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement comprehensive enforcement within the smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports confirming rule enforcement, on-chain transaction analysis.

checklist_items.title: Add input validation and array size limits in incentive management functions to prevent gas exhaustion and DoS attacks.
checklist_items.description: Implement limits on input data size, array lengths, and checks for computational complexity to prevent gas griefing in functions like `add_incentives`.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The `add_incentives` function in Reward Vault (C5) is vulnerable to gas exhaustion or inefficient code execution.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Apply input validation, limit array lengths, and optimize code during development.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Gas profiling reports, code review notes, testing with boundary inputs.

checklist_items.title: Conduct security audits and formal verification of Reward Vault's incentive management functions to prevent privilege escalation and unauthorized parameters manipulation.
checklist_items.description: Perform thorough audits and formal verification of C5's incentive management code to ensure compliance with security best practices, especially on functions like `add_incentives` and `modify`)
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The `add_incentives` function or related components may harbor vulnerabilities like reentrancy or improper access control.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Multiple independent security audits, formal verification, and adherence to secure coding standards.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification reports, code review documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure, verified off-chain system protocols for proposal creation, including multi-party signing and hardware security modules, to prevent tampering.
checklist_items.description: The off-chain systems used for creating proposals might be vulnerable to tampering or compromise. Use of secure hardware, multi-party approval, and cryptographic signatures mitigates this risk.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The proposal creation process is susceptible to tampering without secure controls.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules, multi-party signatures, and off-chain validation procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures, cryptographic signature logs, hardware security module audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Verify the addresses of Reward Vaults and associated contracts before interaction, and display verified status in the user interface.
checklist_items.description: Users should be facilitated with verified contract addresses, whitelisting status, and warnings if interacting with unverified or suspicious vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users might interact with malicious or fake Reward Vaults without verification.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain an official whitelist, display verification status in the UI, and educate users to verify contract addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Whitelist registry snapshots, user interface screenshots, verification process documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication and multisig approval protocols for governance proposals, especially for sensitive actions like reward vault whitelisting.
checklist_items.description: Multifactor approval and multisigs prevent malicious or compromised proposal submissions or modifications, aligning with threat ID 22 mitigation strategies.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal submission or approval mechanisms are susceptible to compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require multi-signature or multi-party approval, enforce approval thresholds, and verify signers' identities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Approval logs, multisig signatures, procedural documentation.

checklist_items.title: Secure Guardian multisig operation through hardened key management, multi-factor authentication, and operational procedures.
checklist_items.description: Guardian multisig security relies on secure key management; operational protocols with hardware security modules, regular key rotations, and multi-factor access reduce risks of key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardian keys may be vulnerable or improperly managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware security modules, multi-factor authentication, regular key rotations, and operational protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational logs, key management policies, security audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement formal verification and rigorous audits on Guardian multisig contracts to ensure enforcement of signature thresholds and resistance to privilege escalation.
checklist_items.description: Formal verification and audits minimize the risk of bypassing signature requirements or privilege elevation vulnerabilities in Guardian multisig (C16).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig contract may contain vulnerabilities allowing breach of threshold enforcement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Formal verification, security audits, and continuous monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verification reports, audit certificates, multisig transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Apply on-chain and off-chain monitoring for Validator and Guardian key activities, stake distribution, and proposal cancellation patterns to detect anomalies.
checklist_items.description: Consistent monitoring with alerts helps detect compromise, key misuse, or abnormal activity and mitigate privilege escalation or DoS.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator or Guardian keys may be compromised or misused.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish real-time monitoring, anomaly detection, and incident response procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring logs, alert records, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Ensure the Reward Vault (C5) enforces documented business rules including rate stability and non-reclaimability, through thorough testing and formal verification.
checklist_items.description: To prevent malicious or unintended incentive parameter manipulation by Token Managers, smart contract enforcement of business rules must be validated via audits and formal checks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) may have flaws in its enforcement of incentive rules.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct comprehensive audits, formal verification, and rigorous code review.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification certificates, unit test results.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure key and signature verification protocols for Guardian multisig transaction payloads and proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.description: Require multi-party signatures, independent payload verification, and use cryptographically secure mechanisms to prevent spoofing or unauthorized proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys are compromised, or signatures are forged.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Multi-factor, multi-party signatures with independent payload verification, and continuous monitoring of multisig activity.

checklist_items.title: Secure off-chain proposal creation infrastructure via hardware security modules, multi-party approval, and cryptographically signed payloads.
checklist_items.description: Tampering of proposal content before on-chain submission by malicious actors using compromised off-chain systems necessitates secure creation and verification mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Verify the addresses of Reward Vaults and their inclusion in official whitelists before staking or user interaction.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: Malicious Reward Vaults can be introduced or listed without verification.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain an official whitelist, educate users, and display verification status in UI.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-factor verification, multi-signature approval, and operational protocols to confirm governance proposals, especially high-impact actions.
checklist_items.description: Mitigate malicious or compromised proposal submissions with multi-party approval, multi-factor authentication, and thresholds for sensitive governance actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal submissions or approvals are vulnerable to compromise.

checklist_items.title: Perform security audits and formal verification of the Guardian multisig contract (C16) to ensure that the 5-of-9 signature enforcement is correct and tamper-proof.

checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Audit and implement safeguards in the Guardian Multisig contract to prevent signature bypass or elevation of privilege vulnerabilities.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig (C16) has a critical vulnerability in its signature verification or execution logic that allows bypassing the M-of-N requirement.

checklist_items.title: Establish and enforce operational processes for Guardians, including key management and off-chain procedures, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.description: Operational procedures should include secure key backups, clear cancellation criteria, and monitoring, reducing risk of DoS due to Guardian unavailability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and strengthen network-level protections and transaction validation for the FeeCollector to prevent overload and DoS.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the FeeCollector becoming inoperable due to malicious or excessive traffic.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The FeeCollector (Component 14) is susceptible to high-volume or gas-heavy attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, validation checks, and network traffic monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, traffic logs, monitoring dashboards.

checklist_items.title: Verify contract addresses of Reward Vaults before staking and in UI listings.
checklist_items.description: Instruct users to verify the contract address of Reward Vaults, ensuring they are interacting with legitimate and whitelisted contracts to prevent spoofing and scams.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may be deceived by malicious Reward Vaults or phishing sites.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Display verified contract addresses, implement onboarding guides, and warn users to verify addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User guidance materials, domain verification logs, UI screenshots.

checklist_items.title: Require secure, tamper-proof off-chain proposal creation and submission protocols, including multisig confirmation, to prevent proposal content tampering.
checklist_items.description: Operational protocols should include secure key backups, multi-party approval, and verification processes to prevent off-chain proposal tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A flaw in off-chain preparation can permit tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Adopt secure development practices, hardware signing modules, and multi-party confirmation mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audits, signed proposal records.

checklist_items.title: Implement source verification and cryptographic signatures to confirm proposal payloads before on-chain execution.
checklist_items.description: Possibility of payload tampering leading to malicious governance outcomes can be mitigated by cryptographic validation of proposal content.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal payloads might be altered before submission.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hashing and signatures to verify payload integrity before on-chain execution.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature validation logs, off-chain payload hashes.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and update smart contracts, including FeeCollector, with source verification, whitelists, and formal security practices.
checklist_items.description: Unverified or malicious contracts can threaten system security. Formal verification and audits mitigate these risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The deployment process lacks security checks or vetting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Follow secure development lifecycle, code audits, and formal verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification certificates.

checklist_items.title: Implement user education and wallet prompts to verify transaction details before signing, especially for high-impact actions.
checklist_items.description: Enhance user awareness and wallet features to reduce tampering, social engineering, and miskeying issues.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users might not verify transaction details before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Wallet prompts, education, and detailed UI must support user verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs, wallet UI demonstrations.

checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive token to prevent spoofing attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce all documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Audit and implement safeguards in the Guardian Multisig contract to prevent signature bypass or elevation of privilege vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.description: The Guardian Multisig contract should be subject to thorough security audits and formal verification to ensure the 5-of-9 signature scheme cannot be bypassed, preventing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) has a critical vulnerability in its signature verification or execution logic that allows bypassing the M-of-N requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits and formal verification of the Guardian Multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, and monitoring logs for multisig execution.

checklist_items.title: Establish operational processes for Guardians, including key management and off-chain procedures, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.description: Operational procedures should include secure key backups, clear cancellation criteria, and monitoring, reducing risk of DoS due to Guardian unavailability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) contains a software vulnerability or is susceptible to network conditions that can cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious staking or unstaking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and implement safeguards such as gas usage limits and transaction size constraints to prevent gas griefing during incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, limit input sizes and array lengths in incentive functions to mitigate gas exhaustion and DoS attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The `add_incentives` function in Reward Vault (C5) is susceptible to unbounded input or high gas consumption.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Apply input validation, set gas limits, and optimize code for gas efficiency.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Gas profiling reports, code review results.

checklist_items.title: Implement rigorous formal verification and security audits for Reward Vault smart contracts to prevent privilege escalation and unauthorized incentive adjustments.
checklist_items.description: Thorough security reviews, including formal methods, help ensure that Reward Vault (C5) is free from vulnerabilities like reentrancy, access control flaws, and logic errors.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) is vulnerable to privilege escalation or security flaws.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct formal verification, rigorous audits, and code reviews.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification artifacts.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure multisig procedures, key management, and operational controls to prevent compromise among Guardian signers and ensure proposal cancellation integrity.
checklist_items.description: Guardian multisig signers' keys must be managed securely, with operational protocols akin to hardware security modules, secure key storage, multi-factor approval, and active monitoring.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardian keys are vulnerable to compromise or operational failure.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong key management, multi-factor approval, secure key storage, and continuous monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures, key management logs, security audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification of validator stake amounts, enforcing min/max bounds during staking transactions.
checklist_items.description: The network should verify that validator stake transactions adhere to the configured bounds, rejecting attempts to undermine validator set integrity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The staking process does not enforce bounds; exploits are possible.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add on-chain validation logic to enforce stake bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review, test cases, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement continuous stake distribution monitoring and alerts to prevent stake centralization and maintain decentralization.
checklist_items.description: Stake concentration predisposes the network to censorship or collusion; monitoring and alerts help enforce healthy stake distribution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Stake centralization risks are not actively monitored.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Set up on-chain dashboards and off-chain monitoring with alerts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Stake distribution reports, alert logs.

checklist_items.title: Ensure the multisig Guardian contract (C16) correctly enforces the 5-of-9 signature requirement and resist bypass attempts through formal verification and audits.
checklist_items.description: Prevent privilege escalation or proposal cancellation bypass via vulnerabilities in multisig logic, confirmed through audits and formal methods.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig contract has a flaw in signature threshold enforcement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct formal verification, thorough security audits, and regular testing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification artifacts.

checklist_items.title: Establish and enforce operational procedures, backups, and contingency plans for Guardian multisig keys and signers.
checklist_items.description: Operational security protocols must include secure key storage, backups, and contingency plans to prevent unavailability or compromise from disrupting proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Operational failure or key compromise can block proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Backup key procedures, operational protocols, incident response.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedure documents, recovery plans.

checklist_items.title: Audit and formal verify the Guardian multisig contract (C16) to ensure no vulnerabilities exist allowing privilege escalation or proposal bypass.

checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design fee collector (Component 14) to handle high transaction volumes securely and efficiently to prevent DoS through transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, transaction rate limiting, and monitoring to prevent attacker-induced DoS via excessive or malicious fee transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BEX (Component 3) might be malicious or bugged, causing high traffic or gas issues.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Optimize contract code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Performance audits, on-chain transaction volume reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement authorization checks in Reward Vault contracts to ensure only designated Token Managers can add or modify incentives.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) may not correctly verify that `msg.sender` is the authorized Token Manager, risking spoofed incentive management.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks comparing `msg.sender` to stored authorized address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate decreases or token reclaiming by malicious or compromised Token Managers.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) should not permit violations of documented incentive management rules, such as reducing rates when active or reclaiming incentives improperly.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement comprehensive enforcement of incentive rules within the contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports confirming enforcement of incentive management constraints.

checklist_items.title: Limit the maximum gas allowed per 'add_incentives' transaction to mitigate gas griefing attacks from malicious Token Managers.
checklist_items.description: The 'add_incentives' function may be vulnerable to gas exhaustion attacks if not carefully designed, enabling malicious Token Managers to cause Denial of Service.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The 'add_incentives' function has no input size checks, making it susceptible to gas griefing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input size limits and gas usage checks within the function.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Gas profiling and testing results demonstrating mitigation effectiveness.

checklist_items.title: Audit and verify the security of Guardian multisig keys and enforce operational procedures to prevent key compromise and misuse.
checklist_items.description: Compromise of Guardian signers (Actor 4) can allow illegitimate proposal cancellations or cancellation without quorum, undermining governance security.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys of Guardian signers are securely stored and operational security is maintained.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor, hardware-based key storage, and regular key audits with threshold signing protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit reports and multi-sig transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish verification protocols for on-chain proposal payloads to ensure content integrity before execution.
checklist_items.description: Possibility of on-chain proposal content tampering or maliciously crafted payloads leading to unintended governance outcomes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal payloads could be altered before on-chain submission due to unverified off-chain processes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hashing and digital signatures to verify proposal integrity before on-chain execution.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature verification logs; off-chain payload hash records.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and update smart contracts, including FeeCollector, with strict source verification and whitelisted interaction lists to prevent spoofed or malicious fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: Unauthenticated or spoofed fee submissions (Asset 16) to the FeeCollector (C14) can cause accounting errors or system disruption.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of incoming fee data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement source whitelisting and strict input validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review; transaction logs showing source verification checks.

checklist_items.title: Implement network and application-level rate limiting and source whitelisting for governance proposal submissions, especially for protocol entities, to prevent spam and denial of service.
checklist_items.description: Unrestricted proposal submission by malicious actors (Actor 3) can overwhelm governance system (Component 8), leading to denial of legitimate proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal submission processes lack rate limiting and access controls.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy rate limiting, CAPTCHA, and on-chain deposit requirements for proposal submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Rate limit logs; governance contract transaction histories.

checklist_items.title: Require cryptographic validation and secure, multi-factor, multi-party authorization for all proposal and key management actions to prevent elevation of privilege.
checklist_items.description: Malicious actors (Actor 3 or unauthorized users) could elevate privileges by submitting or manipulating governance proposals or compromising key management.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Key management practices are weak or compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig approval, hardware security modules, and regular key audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit reports; multisig transaction logs.
