checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and implement hardware security modules (HSM) and multi-factor authentication protocols for validator key management.
checklist_items.description: Strong key management practices including HSMs and MFA reduce the risk of private key compromise and unauthorized actions, supporting network security and validator integrity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's block signing keys are vulnerable to compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware security modules, multi-factor authentication, scheduled key rotations, and monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policies, HSM configuration logs, key rotation audit records.

checklist_items.title: Audit and verify the multisig contract (C16) for correct enforcement of the 5-of-9 signature threshold and resistance to bypass vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.description: A vulnerability in the multisig contract (C16) could allow a small subset of signers to execute privileged actions improperly. Formal verification and auditing mitigate this risk.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig contract contains a flaw allowing bypass of the signature threshold.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Routine formal verification and security audits of C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, on-chain verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish operational procedures and key management policies for Guardian signers, including secure key storage, rotation, and multi-factor approval workflows.
checklist_items.description: Operational procedures and strict key security practices prevent malicious signature creation and proposal cancellation by adversaries compromising Guardian keys.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys of Guardian signers are compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules, multi-factor authentication, key rotation, and regular security audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedure documents, key management logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify the on-chain enforcement of maximum stake limits for validators during staking transactions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should not be able to stake less than 250k or more than 10M $BERA, enforced via on-chain validation logic.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The staking module may lack enforced limits.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain validation checks preventing violation of stake bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain validation logs, test cases demonstrating enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and monitoring systems for validator stake operations to prevent stake centralization and abuse.
checklist_items.description: Monitoring stake distribution with thresholds and alerts supports decentralization and prevents staking attacks or collusion.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Stake from one entity can be aggregated to control the validator set.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy stake monitoring, threshold enforcement, and community policies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Stake distribution reports, alert logs.

checklist_items.title: Conduct comprehensive security audits and formal verification of smart contracts related to staking, delegating, and validator operations.
checklist_items.description: Vulnerabilities in these modules could enable malicious manipulation of stake or validator control, threatening network security. Formal verification and audits ensure adherence to security standards.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Code contains vulnerabilities or logic flaws that can be exploited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Schedule regular audits, formal verification, and code review.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit certificates, formal verification artifacts.

checklist_items.title: Verify that all proposal submissions include digital signatures from verified off-chain authorities and are linked to cryptographically signed proposal content.
checklist_items.description: Proper signing and verification prevent proposal tampering and impersonation during submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Off-chain proposal systems can be compromised, or signatures can be forged.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require multi-party signatures, digital signatures, and on-chain verification of proposal data.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed proposal records, cryptographic signature verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify contract addresses and source authenticity of Reward Vaults before user interactions to prevent spoofed or malicious vaults.
checklist_items.description: Users should only interact with verified Reward Vaults, confirmed by registry and UI indicators, to prevent loss to malicious contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Unverified or malicious Reward Vaults could deceive users.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain publisher and registry verification, display verified status in UI.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Registry audit logs, UI screenshots.

checklist_items.title: Require wallet transaction verification with UI prompts and displays for critical operations like staking, unstaking, and claiming.
checklist_items.description: User confirmation of transaction details reduces tampering risk and supports user awareness.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may not verify transaction data before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Wallet UI should display detailed operation info, with user prompts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: UI logs, user acknowledgment records.

checklist_items.title: Implement source verification and whitelisting in FeeCollector contract to accept fees only from trusted contracts.
checklist_items.description: This prevents spoofed or malicious fee submissions, safeguarding fee accounting and distribution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector may accept data from any source.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement whitelist verification or signatures to authenticate fee sources.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Source verification code, audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish rate limiting and transaction monitoring for fee submissions to prevent flooding and DoS.
checklist_items.description: Prevent malicious actors from flooding fee transactions or incurring gas exhaustion with heavy submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Fee sources can flood the system.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy rate limits, monitor incoming transactions, and set thresholds for alerts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs, alert records.

checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive token to prevent spoofing attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce all documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Audit and implement safeguards in the Guardian Multisig contract to prevent signature bypass or elevation of privilege vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.description: The Guardian Multisig contract should be subject to thorough security audits and formal verification to ensure the 5-of-9 signature scheme cannot be bypassed, preventing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) has a critical vulnerability in its signature verification or execution logic that allows bypassing the M-of-N requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits and formal verification of the Guardian Multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, and monitoring logs for multisig execution.

checklist_items.title: Establish and enforce operational processes for Guardians, including key management and off-chain procedures, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.description: Operational procedures should include secure key backups, clear cancellation criteria, and monitoring, reducing risk of DoS due to Guardian unavailability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) contains a software vulnerability or is susceptible to network conditions that can cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious staking or unstaking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) staking module to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design FeeCollector (Component 14) to handle high transaction volumes securely and efficiently to prevent DoS through transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, transaction rate limiting, and monitoring to prevent attacker-induced DoS via excessive or malicious fee transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BEX (Component 3) might be malicious or bugged, causing high traffic or gas issues.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Optimize contract code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Performance audits, on-chain transaction volume reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement authorization checks in Reward Vault contracts to ensure only designated Token Managers can add or modify incentives.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) may not correctly verify the caller as the authorized Token Manager, risking unauthorized incentive modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict and correct authorization checks in the Reward Vault contract, verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce business logic constraints in Reward Vault's incentive management functions to prevent rate decreases during active incentives or unauthorized token reclamation.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) might not rigorously enforce incentive management rules, allowing malicious Token Managers to violate documented policies.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) has a flaw allowing bypass of incentive management rules.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement comprehensive enforcement of incentive rules within the contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports confirming enforcement of incentive management constraints.

checklist_items.title: Limit the maximum gas allowed per `add_incentives` transaction to mitigate gas griefing attacks from malicious Token Managers.
checklist_items.description: The `add_incentives` function may be vulnerable to gas exhaustion attacks if not carefully designed, enabling malicious Token Managers to cause Denial of Service.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The `add_incentives` function has no input size checks, making it susceptible to gas griefing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input size limits and gas usage checks within the function.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Gas profiling and testing results demonstrating mitigation effectiveness.

checklist_items.title: Audit and verify the security of Guardian multisig keys and enforce operational procedures to prevent key compromise and misuse.
checklist_items.description: Compromise of Guardian signers (Actor 4) can allow illegitimate proposal cancellations or cancellation without quorum, undermining governance security.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys of Guardian signers are securely stored and operational security is maintained.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor, hardware-based key storage, and regular key audits with threshold signing protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit reports and multi-sig transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish verification protocols for on-chain proposal payloads to ensure content integrity before execution.
checklist_items.description: Possibility of on-chain proposal content tampering or maliciously crafted payloads leading to unintended governance outcomes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal payloads could be altered before on-chain submission due to unverified off-chain processes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hashing and digital signatures to verify proposal integrity before on-chain execution.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature verification logs; off-chain payload hash records.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and update smart contracts, including FeeCollector, with strict source verification and whitelisted interaction lists to prevent spoofed or malicious fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: Unauthenticated or spoofed fee submissions (Asset 16) to the FeeCollector (C14) can cause accounting errors or system disruption.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of incoming fee data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement source whitelisting and strict input validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review; transaction logs showing source verification checks.

checklist_items.title: Implement network and application-level rate limiting and source whitelisting for governance proposal submissions, especially for protocol entities, to prevent spam and denial of service.
checklist_items.description: Unrestricted proposal submission by malicious actors (Actor 3) can overwhelm governance system (Component 8), leading to denial of legitimate proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal submission processes lack rate limiting and access controls.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy rate limiting, CAPTCHA, and on-chain deposit requirements for proposal submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Rate limit logs; governance contract transaction histories.

checklist_items.title: Require cryptographic validation and secure, multi-factor, multi-party authorization for all proposal and key management actions to prevent elevation of privilege.
checklist_items.description: Malicious actors (Actor 3 or unauthorized users) could elevate privileges by submitting or manipulating governance proposals or compromising key management.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Key management practices are weak or compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig approval, hardware security modules, and regular key audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit reports; multisig transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and update smart contracts, including HoneyFactory, with formal verification and comprehensive security audits.
checklist_items.description: Vulnerabilities in smart contracts (e.g., HoneyFactory) can be exploited by malicious users (Actor 1) to mint unbacked tokens or drain funds.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: HoneyFactory contract contains vulnerabilities or has been unvetted.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Perform formal verification, code audits, and security reviews before deploying or upgrading HoneyFactory.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports; formal verification proofs; code review records.

checklist_items.title: Ensure collateral valuation and liquidation mechanisms are robust and resilient against market manipulation and liquidity risks in HoneyFactory (C7).
checklist_items.description: Redemption failures or insolvency scenarios in HoneyFactory (C7) can prevent users from retrieving their collateralized assets, impacting trust and system stability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Collateral management is susceptible to market volatility or contract bugs.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement conservative collateral requirements, real-time oracle price feeds, and liquidation liquidity buffers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Collateral management monitoring logs; oracle data accuracy reports.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure, multi-factor authentication and operational procedures for validator key management, including hardware security modules and key rotation.
checklist_items.description: Validator private keys should be managed securely with hardware wallets, multi-sig, MFA, and scheduled key rotations, to prevent theft and ensure operational resilience.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validation keys are vulnerable due to poor operational security practices.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware-security modules, MFA, regular key rotations, and strict access control procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policies, hardware security setup logs, rotation schedules.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature approval for governance proposals and critical actions, requiring signatures from multiple independent signers before execution.
checklist_items.description: To prevent malicious proposal submissions or cancellations, establish multi-sig approval protocols, threshold signatures, and multi-party consent.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys of guardians or signers are vulnerable or not securely managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust key management, threshold signing, and multi-party approval protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Multisig approval logs, key management policies.

checklist_items.title: Maintain and regularly audit secure key management practices for Guardian signers, including hardware security modules, key rotation, and multi-factor authentication.
checklist_items.description: Secure Guardian signer keys to prevent unauthorized proposal cancellations or privileges escalation through rigorous key control protocols.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardian signer keys may be compromised or poorly managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware security modules, MFA, key rotation policies, and security audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational security procedures, key management logs, security audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Ensure on-chain enforcement of maximum stake bounds and validation during staking transactions, with continuous monitoring.
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain logic to validate stake sizes against fixed bounds and monitor for violations, preventing exploit attempts to bypass limits.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Stake transactions can bypass enforcement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Embed validation logic in staking smart contracts, with off-chain or on-chain monitoring for anomalies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Contract code, validation logs, monitoring reports.

checklist_items.title: Enforce token deposit and funding verification in reward systems to prevent underfunded incentives.
checklist_items.description: Implement checks ensuring Token Managers deposit sufficient incentive tokens, with on-chain balance verification, to prevent reward promise failures.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Incentive funding can be insufficient or improperly managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Verify token deposits on-chain before offsets like 'add_incentives' or 'claim' functions execute.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Balance checks, deposit verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Conduct regular security audits and formal verification of smart contracts handling incentives, such as Reward Vault, to prevent privilege escalation and vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.description: Periodic audits and formal verification ensure the incentive management smart contracts are secure and compliant with best practices.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault (C5) may contain vulnerabilities enabling privilege escalation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Schedule regular security audits, formal verification, and code reviews.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification artifacts.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication and multi-signature approval for governance proposal submissions and critical actions.
checklist_items.description: Protect proposal submissions and governance actions with multi-factor or multi-party approval mechanisms, preventing spoofed or malicious actions (Threat ID 22).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal creators' credentials could be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor, multi-signature approval, and cryptographic verification steps.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Approval logs, cryptographic verification records.

checklist_items.title: Establish operational procedures for Guardian signer key security, including secure hardware storage, multi-factor access, and incident response plans.
checklist_items.description: Operational security procedures for Guardian signers help prevent key compromise and ensure proposal cancellation capability under attack.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardian signer keys may be compromised or mismanaged.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware security modules, multi-factor access, key rotation, and incident response procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational protocols, key management logs, incident response reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement strict authorization checks in Reward Vault contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive to prevent spoofing attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce all documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Verify that Reward Vault addresses are validated before staking or interaction, using on-chain address verification and whitelist mechanisms.
checklist_items.description: Malicious parties could register fake Reward Vaults or promote non-whitelisted vaults, leading users to stake assets in malicious contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults are created permissionlessly without on-chain verification.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require on-chain verification and vetting of Reward Vaults before listing in user interfaces.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Whitelist registry logs; audit reports of Reward Vault deployment.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) contains a software vulnerability or is susceptible to network conditions that can cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious staking or unstaking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design FeeCollector (Component 14) to handle high transaction volumes securely and efficiently to prevent DoS through transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, transaction rate limiting, and monitoring to prevent attacker-induced DoS via excessive or malicious fee transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BEX (Component 3) might be malicious or bugged, causing high traffic or gas issues.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Optimize contract code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Performance audits, on-chain transaction volume reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement authorization checks in Reward Vault contracts to ensure only designated Token Managers can add or modify incentives.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) may not correctly verify the 'msg.sender' as the Token Manager, risking unauthorized incentive modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its 'msg.sender' validation against the authorized Token Manager.

checklist_items.title: Enforce business logic constraints in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate decreases or token reclamation by malicious or compromised Token Managers.
checklist_items.description: The Reward Vault (C5) should implement and enforce all documented business rules for incentive management, such as preventing rate decreases during active periods or reclaiming incentives improperly.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through code.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying enforcement of incentive management constraints.

checklist_items.title: Validate that Reward Vault deposits and incentive token transfers are from whitelisted, verified sources to prevent malicious injection or token theft.
checklist_items.description: Deposits of Incentive Tokens from unverified or malicious sources could manipulate reward mechanisms.

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement whitelist or signature verification for Incentive Token deposits.

checklist_items.title: Implement gas limits and input validation in 'add_incentives' to prevent gas griefing attacks.
checklist_items.description: Smart contract (C5) should limit input sizes, array lengths, and complexity in 'add_incentives' functions to prevent gas exhaustion.

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement limits, optimize code, and conduct gas analysis during development.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design high-volume transaction safeguards and rate limiting in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent DoS via transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers to prevent attacker-induced DoS via excessive or malicious fee transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BEX (Component 3) might be malicious or bugged, causing high traffic or gas issues.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Optimize contract code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Performance audits, on-chain transaction volume reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement authorization checks in Reward Vault contracts to verify only designated Token Managers can add or modify incentives.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) may not correctly verify the msg.sender, risking unauthorized incentive modifications. Implementing checks prevents spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorizations, verifying `msg.sender` against stored addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Enforce business logic rules in Reward Vault to prevent incentive rate decreases during active periods and unauthorized token reclamation.
checklist_items.description: Smart contracts should implement rules such as disallowing reward rate decreases during active rewards or reclaiming incentives unless explicitly permitted.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) has a flaw allowing bypass of incentive rules.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict enforcement, including state checks and immutable parameters, to prevent rule violations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports confirming rule enforcement, on-chain state validations.

checklist_items.title: Apply input validation and size limits in `add_incentives` to prevent gas griefing attacks.
checklist_items.description: Implement input validation, such as array length limits, and gas checks to prevent maliciously crafted inputs causing high gas consumption and denial of service.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The `add_incentives` function in Reward Vault (C5) is not optimized for gas or has vulnerabilities allowing gas griefing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Refactor code for gas efficiency, validate inputs, and limit array sizes during development.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Gas profiling and code review reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive token to prevent spoofing attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce all documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Audit and implement safeguards in the Guardian Multisig contract to prevent signature bypass or elevation of privilege vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.description: The Guardian Multisig contract should be subject to thorough security audits and formal verification to ensure the 5-of-9 signature scheme cannot be bypassed, preventing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) has a critical vulnerability in its signature verification or execution logic that allows bypassing the M-of-N requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits and formal verification of the Guardian Multisig logic.

checklist_items.title: Establish and enforce operational processes for Guardians, including key management and off-chain procedures, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig contract (C16) contains a software vulnerability or is susceptible to network conditions that can cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious staking or unstaking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design FeeCollector (Component 14) to handle high transaction volumes securely and efficiently to prevent DoS through transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, transaction rate limiting, and monitoring to prevent attacker-induced DoS via excessive or malicious fee transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BEX (Component 3) might be malicious or bugged, causing high traffic or gas issues.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Optimize contract code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Performance audits, on-chain transaction volume reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement authorization checks in Reward Vault contracts to ensure only designated Token Managers can add or modify incentives.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) may not correctly verify 'msg.sender' as the authorized Token Manager, risking unauthorized incentive modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict and correct authorization checks, verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks in incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce business logic constraints in Reward Vault's incentive management functions to prevent unauthorized parameter modifications.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault (C5) might not prevent incentive parameters from being manipulated outside documented rules, allowing malicious Token Manager (A5) to violate documented incentive policies.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement comprehensive enforcement of incentive rules within the contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation and gas optimization techniques in 'add_incentives' functions to prevent gas griefing attacks.
checklist_items.description: Implement input size checks, limit loop iterations, and optimize storage operations in Incentive Token management functions to prevent excessive gas consumption caused by malicious Token Managers.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The 'add_incentives' function has no input size checks, making it susceptible to gas griefing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input validation, array length limits, and gas usage checks within the function.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Gas profiling and testing results demonstrating mitigation effectiveness.

checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive to prevent spoofing attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce all documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw in its `msg.sender` validation against the authorized Token Manager address for the specific incentive being managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authorization checks during incentive management functions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict business logic in Reward Vault contracts to prevent incentive rate manipulations such as premature decreases or unauthorized withdrawals.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault smart contracts must implement and rigorously enforce documented business rules for incentive management to prevent tampering or malicious parameter changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract (C5) has a flaw allowing a Token Manager to bypass rules like 'cannot decrease rate while active' or 'cannot reclaim tokens'.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure the Reward Vault enforces all incentive management rules through strict smart contract logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying business logic enforcement in Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Audit and verify the security of Guardian multisig keys and enforce operational procedures to prevent key compromise and misuse.
checklist_items.description: The Guardian multisig should be thoroughly audited and verified to ensure the 5-of-9 signature scheme cannot be bypassed, preventing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig (C16) has a critical vulnerability allowing bypass of the signature scheme.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits and formal verification of the Guardian multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, multisig transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish operational procedures for Guardians, including key management, backup, and unbonding periods, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.description: Procedures should include secure key backups, clear cancellation criteria, and monitoring, reducing risk of DoS due to Guardian unavailability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig (C16) to prevent DoS via exploitation or network issues.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Guardian Multisig (C16) contains a vulnerability or is susceptible to network conditions causing DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious staking or unstaking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists allowing bypass of stake limits, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.

checklist_items.title: Design FeeCollector (Component 14) to handle high transaction volumes securely and efficiently to prevent DoS through transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Implement gas-efficient code, transaction rate limiting, and monitoring to prevent attacker-induced DoS via excessive or malicious fee transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BEX (Component 3) might be malicious or bugged, causing high traffic or gas issues.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Optimize contract code, track transaction volume, and deploy throttling or circuit breakers.

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input validation, limit array lengths, and optimize gas usage patterns.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and execute transaction rate limiting and monitoring in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent DoS via transaction flooding.
checklist_items.description: Deep security audits and monitoring of network conditions can reduce the risk of the Guardian Multisig becoming inoperable due to bugs or network attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The FeeCollector faces potential DoS threats from high transaction volume or gas exhaustion.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy rate limiting, transaction limits, and activity monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction volume logs; alert logs for thresholds breaches.

checklist_items.title: Establish and reinforce user education and UI warnings to prevent connecting to spoofed or malicious dApps.
checklist_items.description: User interaction with malicious or spoofed dApps can lead to asset theft. User education and security warnings reduce this risk.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may not verify the authenticity of dApp URLs before connecting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Provide official verification guides, browser alerts, and domain name validation tools.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User security awareness training completion records; browser extension verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication and multi-signature approval protocols for proposal submission and critical governance actions.
checklist_items.description: These controls ensure only legitimate governance actions are executed, and mitigate threats from compromised credentials or malicious proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak authentication mechanisms enable malicious proposal submission or governance manipulation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use multi-party approval, multi-factor authentication, and hardware-based signing protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Approval logs, multi-signature signatures, hardware token logs.

checklist_items.title: Develop and deploy secure, verified smart contracts for Reward Vaults, FeeCollector, and other critical components, including formal verification and security audits.
checklist_items.description: Secure deployment and implementation of smart contracts prevent exploitation, privilege escalation, and asset loss.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Deployment processes lack adequate security review or formal verification.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Adopt best practices, periodic audits, formal verification, and thorough testing before deploying or upgrading contracts.

checklist_items.title: Secure off-chain proposal creation systems with hardware security modules, multi-factor authentication, and code signing to prevent tampering.

checklist_items.title: Implement proper authorization checks in Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only the designated Token Manager EOA can call incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should verify that the caller (msg.sender) is the correct, authorized Token Manager for a specific incentive token to prevent spoofing attempts.

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict authorization checks verifying `msg.sender` against stored authorized Token Manager address.

checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, and monitoring logs for multisig execution.

checklist_items.title: Establish and enforce operational processes for Guardians, including key management and off-chain procedures, to prevent operational failure in proposal cancellation.
checklist_items.description: Operational procedures should include secure key backups, clear cancellation criteria, and monitoring, reducing risk of DoS due to Guardian unavailability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A genuinely malicious proposal is identified by some Guardians during the timelock period, but fewer than 5 Guardians are available to cancel it.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement operational protocols for Guardian key management and unavailability handling.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Standard Operating Procedures documentation, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply network-level protections and regular security audits to the Guardian Multisig contract (C16) to prevent DoS via exploit or network issues.

checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, formal verification, and network monitoring for C16.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit summaries, on-chain monitoring logs.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen private key management practices for Berachain Validators to prevent compromise and unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.description: Validators should adopt secure key custody solutions, unbonding periods, and monitoring to prevent key compromise from leading to malicious staking or unstaking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator's private key used for managing their stake is compromised, allowing malicious unstaking or transfer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure key management, hardware security modules, and set unbonding periods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key custody audit reports, transaction logs showing stake changes.

checklist_items.title: Implement collateral validation and limit checks in Berachain Network (C1) to prevent exceeding maximum stake limit (10M $BERA).
checklist_items.description: The staking mechanism must verify that the amount staked per validator falls within predefined bounds to prevent exploitation or misreporting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability exists that allows bypassing the maximum stake limit, leading to higher influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use strict validation in staking functions to enforce minimum and maximum bounds.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce stake amount bounds in the Berachain staking module to prevent exploitation of stake limits.
checklist_items.description: Staking transactions should be validated to ensure amounts are within 250k and 10M $BERA, preventing over-staking from exploits or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability allowing staking outside bounds can be exploited to gain undue influence.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict input validation for stake amounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validation logic review, on-chain transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement fee whitelisting verification in FeeCollector (Component 14) to prevent spoofed fee submissions.
checklist_items.description: FeeCollector should verify incoming fee data sources against a whitelist of legitimate, trusted contracts to prevent spoofing or malicious fee data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: FeeCollector does not verify the source of fee data, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add source authentication checks or whitelist validation in FeeCollector contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audits, on-chain transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Design and implement safeguards such as gas limits, transaction caps, and monitoring to prevent gas griefing during incentive management functions.
checklist_items.description: Functions like `add_incentives` could be exploited by crafting inputs that cause high gas consumption, leading to DoS. Implementing input size limits and gas checks mitigates this.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The `add_incentives` function in Reward Vault (C5) is not optimized for gas or susceptible to gas griefing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement gas-efficient code, input size validation, and thorough testing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Gas profiling reports, code review documents.
